_instructions.about: This file defines the topics users can choose from. You should not need to edit this file when manifestos are published — only edit the party files in the parties/ folder.
_instructions.adding_a_topic: To add a new topic: copy an existing block, give it a unique 'id', write the name/icon/desc, set the three questionLabels, and add a score for every party id (lab, snp, con, ld, ref). Then add that party id to every party file under topicScores.

questionLabels.support: Shown on the left-hand button — the position that ALIGNS with a high party score (4-5)
questionLabels.oppose: Shown on the right-hand button — the position that ALIGNS with a low party score (1-2)
